author: @duncancremin1708
text:
I’m starting from the beginning, planning to take the full journey, following the sad news of Robert’s passing, but others may be here for a different reason.
You can, and should, dismantle those electrical connector blocks by unscrewing the grub screws and pushing the metal connector out. Much safer than the way Robert did it.

text: Wow I never thought of that block ..cool God bless you sir for sharing giving this idea
